name: This is not a cat.
description:
"Uh Oh!"



A large number of reports are coming from that place specifically, complaints coming from the neighborhood: The Mandela County. Many people are ending up missing and are moving away from the neighborhood, oddly enough, police cant seem to find the cause...maybe it's because they are searching during the day...but regardless, all cases for the mandela county are canceled..and..it is advise you just stay away from that place at all times, the reports from the mandela county have not spreaded throughout the area around it either for some odd reason and ever since then, you have been living life..Unknowingly that this sll happened.....that is untill your friend sofie was recently killed of a case of suicide...ever since then you have been looking after her cat named johnny, but now...with it's recent behavior and the odd stuff happening around your house....you are starting to wonder if this is an actual cat you are Coexisting with.

The "Cat"

The Alternate

This is my revamp, the original artist is Rabiosim(I think)



Does not like Mary all that much
